title: Neelagiri Express
subTitle: When a rich man is murdered on a running train, Inspector Shankar tries to solve the mystery. Since Ravanan is the only passenger travelling with the deceased, he decides to help him.

title: Songs
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of catchy, popular and entertaining songs by various artists and bands from around the world, is played back-to-back.

title: Deiveega Raagam
subTitle: The host plays a comprehensive compilation of various devotional songs performed and composed by different artists in praise of the Almighty.

title: Margazhi Magathuvam
subTitle: A religious scholar provides deeper insights into the theological significance pertaining to the Tamil month of Margazhi.

title: Sinthanai Sei Maname
subTitle: The host offers insightful guidance on achieving self-awareness, emotional balance and overcoming life's challenges, encouraging viewers to reflect on their personal journeys.

title: Nattu Maruthuvam
subTitle: A specialist in Siddha medicine demonstrates the preparation of herbal medicines and describes their properties to treat various ailments.

title: Rasi Palan
subTitle: A professional astrologer reads out predictions for the twelve zodiac signs based on the celestial positions of the stars and planets.

title: Thulluvatho Isai
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of cheerful melodious songs from evergreen movies featuring talented stars from the Tamil film industry is played.

title: Maestro Melodies
subTitle: A comprehensive collection of soulful melodious songs composed by Ilaiyaraaja, a legendary singer and musician who has contributed significantly to the Indian film industry.

title: Innisaiye
subTitle: The host presents a compilation of melodious and upbeat songs from popular Tamil films, performed by talented artists from the music industry.

title: Raman Thediya Seethai
subTitle: Raman, who runs a very successful business, wishes to get married. After several rejections due to his stammering, he finally falls in love with a sales girl.

title: Colourfull Comedy
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of hilarious movie scenes and clippings from evergreen Tamil films is played to tickle the funny bones of the viewers.

title: Galatta Kalyanam
subTitle: In order to marry Lalitha, Madhan sets out to find suitable bachelors for her three beautiful sisters as part of a condition set by her father.
